project: Implement comprehensive API rate limiting and throttling system. Create Redis-based rate limiter with sliding window algorithm. Add per-IP and per-user limits with configurable tiers. Implement endpoint-specific limits (burst vs sustained). Create admin panel for managing rate limit policies. Add detailed rate limit metrics and monitoring. Implement intelligent rate limit bypass for trusted clients. Create rate limit violation alerts and notifications. Add circuit breaker pattern for overloaded endpoints. Implement request queuing with priority levels. Create comprehensive rate limit testing suite.
